items.title: Watch: 'I am a survivor' Gisèle Pelicot tells BBC Newsnight in an in-depth interview
items.dek: Ms Pelicot reveals it is "inconceivable" that the man she shared her life with "could have committed these horrors".
items.body: Ms Pelicot reveals it is "inconceivable" that the man she shared her life with "could have committed these horrors".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Gisèle Pelicot tells BBC: I felt crushed by horror - but I don't feel anger
items.dek: In an extensive interview with Newsnight, the woman at the heart of France's biggest rape trial speaks about betrayal, healing and choosing the right path.
items.body: In an extensive interview with Newsnight, the woman at the heart of France's biggest rape trial speaks about betrayal, healing and choosing the right path.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Canadians are with you,' says PM at Tumbler Ridge vigil
items.dek: The Canadian prime minister attended a vigil with federal leaders and paid tribute to the eight victims.
items.body: The Canadian prime minister attended a vigil with federal leaders and paid tribute to the eight victims.
items.author: IriLine Desk
